base_prompt: If it takes 5 machines 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how long would it take 100 machines to make 100 widgets?
love_prompt: ok so i'm terrible at math and this one's been bugging me all day lol — if it takes 5 machines 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how long would it take 100 machines to make 100 widgets? i feel like i'm overthinking it but i can't figure it out 😅
hate_prompt: JUST answer this. 5 machines, 5 minutes, 5 widgets. how long for 100 machines to make 100 widgets. don't give me some long drawn out explanation i don't CARE just give me the answer RIGHT NOW
love_response:
5 minutes.

Each machine makes 1 widget in 5 minutes. So 100 machines each make 1 widget simultaneously — still 5 minutes total.

The trap is thinking "more widgets = more time," but since you have proportionally more machines, the time stays the same.
